title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush Set | Pack of 5 | 0.5", 1", 1.5", 2"
features: Ideal for painting smaller areas on walls and ceilings
Pack of 5 brushes in 4 different sizes for versatility
Soft synthetic filament brush heads for excellent paint pick-up and even flow
Comfortable and easy-to-grip handles for long decorating sessions
Easy to clean by rinsing under the tap
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings 5 Paint Brush Pack Contents 1 x 0.5" Brush 1 x 1" Brush 1 x 1.5" Brush 2 x 2" Brush Use for painting smaller walls & ceilings areas The pack features paint brush in 4 different sizes meaning you can select the best brush for your painting task. The brushes are ideal for cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and along skirting boards. These Harris Essentials brushes have good paint pick up and give you a good paint finish when used with emulsion paints. Doing a Painting Project Don't forget to team your Essentials paint brushes with the Essentials 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller Set and the Essentials 4" Gloss & Emulsion Roller Set! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
